name: before-after
description: Compact transformation ad: Hook → Before (the struggle) → After (the change, product featured) → CTA. ~24s.

beats.title: Hook
beats.goal: Tease the transformation in one line — make the viewer need to see the after

beats.title: Before
beats.goal: Show the frustrating status quo, concrete and relatable

beats.title: After
beats.goal: Show life with the product — visible difference, product hero moment with readable label

beats.title: Call To Action
beats.goal: One clear action with a reason to act now
